nasb.text: There is no relief for your breakdown, Your wound is incurable. All who hear about you Will clap their hands over you, For on whom has not your evil passed continually?

esv.text: There is no easing your hurt; your wound is grievous. All who hear the news about you clap their hands over you. For upon whom has not come your unceasing evil?

cnv.text: 你的創傷無法醫治； 你受的打擊非常嚴重。 聽見你這消息的， 都必向你鼓掌； 因為你不斷行惡， 誰沒有受過害呢？

ccb.text: 你的创伤无法救治， 你的伤势极其严重。 听见这消息的人必鼓掌欢呼， 因为谁没受过你无休止的暴虐呢？
